faq.question: What is ZWCAD?
faq.answer: ZWCAD is CAD software for 2D/3D design with DWG compatibility.

faq.question: Do you provide support in Vietnam?
faq.answer: Yes. FocusTech provides deployment, training and support.

faq.question: Is there a perpetual license?
faq.answer: Yes, depending on package and business needs.
